SpTU 2, 033 [Šumma Alu Excerpts][via cams/gkab]

Top
t.e. 1t.e. 1

ina a-mat d60 u an-tu₄ liš-lim

(t.e. 1) At the command of Anu and Antu may it go well.

Obverse
oo Some firing-holes on obverse, irregular
o 11

[...] x GAL URU TU BA [...]

(o 1) [...] ... [...]

o 22

[...] x ⸢BULUG?⸣ i-ba-aʾ-⸢tu₂?⸣ [...]

(o 2) [...] ... spends the night [...]

o 33

[...] ⸢i-na⸣ KASKAL TA 15 NA ana 2.30 [e]-⸢tiq LU₂⸣ BI AŠ₂-⸢su⸣ [...]

(o 3) [...] on a path crosses from a man's right to (his) left: that man [...] his wish.

o 44

[*] ⸢KA₅⸣.A i-na KASKAL TA 2.30 NA ana 15 NA e-tiq LU₂ BI AŠ₂-su KUR!ad₂

(o 4) (If) a fox on a path crosses from a man's left to (his) right: that man will achieve his wish.

o 55

[*] KA₅.A i-na KASKAL <ana> IGI NA i-sur-ma ina GIR₃-šu₂ SAḪAR-ḪI.A iš-lu₂-u₄ LU₂ BI x PI? SAL? x GAL?

(o 5) (If) a fox on a path, circles in front of a man and whirls up dust with its feet: that man ....

o 66

* KA₅.A i-na KASKAL ana ZA₃ NA e-tiq la!(MA) KUR A₂.( • )AŠ₂

(o 6) (If) a fox on a path crosses from the man's left to (his) right: not achieving a wish.

o 77

* KA₅.A i-na <KASKAL> ana GUB₃ NA e-tiq ( • ) KUR ( • ) A₂.( • )AŠ₂

(o 7) (If) a fox on a path crosses from the man's left: achieving a wish.

o 88

* NA TUŠ-šu₂ ZI-ma KA₅.A ina ZA₃ NA GU₃si-ma ta-ḫe-e KAŠ₄um

(o 8) (If) a man approaches his dwelling and a fox cries out on the man's right and runs beside (him): that man, wherever he ... a man will fight with him but he will experience good fortune.

o 99

NA BI a-šar? BAR?-šu₂ NAM? SU? LU₂ DU₁₄ i-gar-ru-šu-ma NI₃.SIG₅ ⸢IGImar?⸣

o 1010

* KI.MIN<(NA)> TUŠ-šu₂ ZI-ma KA₅.A ina GUB₃! NA KI.MIN<(GU₃si-ma)> LU₂ BI KI DUku ḪA.⸢LA⸣ [...] MIN x

(o 10) (If) ditto (a man approaches his dwelling and) a fox cries out on the man's left: that man, wherever he goes, [...] ... a share.

o 1111

* KI.MIN<(NA)> TUŠ-šu₂ ZI-ma KA₅.A ina ZA₃ NA GU₃si-ma ana EDIN DU.DU LU₂ BI x [...] x

(o 11) (If) ditto (a man approaches his dwelling and) a fox cries out on the man's right and keeps going to the open country: that man ... [...] ... .

o 1212

* KI.MIN<(NA)> TUŠ-šu₂ ZI-ma KA₅.A ina GUB₃ NA KI.MIN<(GU₃si-ma)> LU₂ KI DUku A₂.AŠ₂ [...]

(o 12) (If) ditto (a man approaches his dwelling and) a fox cries out on the man's left: that man, wherever he goes, [...] a wish.

o 1313

* KI.MIN<(NA)> TUŠ-šu₂ ZI-ma KA₅.A ina ZA₃ NA iq-nun-ma NU₂iṣ LU₂! BI! ḪA.LA [...]

(o 13) (If) ditto (a man approaches his dwelling and) a fox makes a lair and sits on the man's right: that man, ... a share.

o 1414

* KI.MIN<(NA)> TUŠ-šu₂ ZI-ma KA₅.A ina GUB₃ NA KI.MIN<(iq-nun-ma)> NU₂iṣ LU₂ BI ḪA.LA-MEŠ ⸢id⸣ [...]

(o 14) (If) ditto (a man approaches his dwelling) and a fox ditto (makes a lair and sits) on the man's left: that man, ... the shares.

o 1515

* KI.MIN<(NA)> TUŠ-šu₂ ZI-ma KA₅.A ina ZA₃ NA GU₃si-ma LU₂ BI AŠ₂-su NU KUR [...]

(o 15) (If) ditto (a man approaches his dwelling and) a fox cries out on the man's right: that man will not achieve his wish [...].

o 1616

* KI.MIN<(NA)> TUŠ-šu₂ ZI-ma KA₅.A ina GUB₃ NA GU₃.GU₃si LU₂ BI ( • ) KUR ( • ) [...]

(o 16) (If) ditto (a man approaches his dwelling and) a fox keeps crying out on the man's left: that man: achieving ....

o 1717

* KI.MIN<(NA)> TUŠ-šu₂ ZI-ma KA₅.A DIB-ma ina IGI NA KAŠ₄um LU₂ BI KI DUku x [...]

(o 17) (If) ditto (a man approaches his dwelling and) a fox passes by and runs in front of the man: that man, wherever he goes ....

o 1818

* KI.MIN<(NA)> TUŠ-šu₂ ZI-ma KA₅.A ana IGI NA KAŠ₄um LU₂ BI KI DUku i-⸢ḫad⸣-[du]

(o 18) (If) ditto (a man approaches his dwelling and) a fox runs in front of the man: that man, wherever he goes, will rejoice.

4 firing holes in line space
o 1919

* KI.MIN<(NA)> TUŠ-šu₂ ZI-ma KA₅.A ana IGI NA KAŠ₄-ma a-na ZA₃ NA iIGI LU₂ ⸢BI⸣ [...]

(o 19) (If) ditto (a man approaches his dwelling and) a fox runs in front of the man and is seen on the right of (that?) man, that man [...] .

o 2020

* KI.MIN<(NA)> TUŠ-šu₂ ZI-ma KA₅.A KI.MIN<(ana)> IGI NA KAŠ₄-ma a-na GUB₃ NA iIGI la₃ KUR [...]

(o 20) (If) ditto (a man approaches his dwelling and) a fox ditto (runs in front of the man and) is seen on the left of (that?) man: not achieving [...] .

Reverse
(colophon)
r 11

38 nis-ḫi * IRI ina SUKUDe GARin BAR-MEŠ la₃ AL.⸢TIL⸣

(r 1) 38th excerpt of "If a city is located on a height"; non-canonical; not completed.

vertical and central rules on rest of reverse
2 lines of 10 firing holes each
r 22

⸢IM⸣ mNIG₂.SUM.MU—d60 A ša₂ md60—EN-šu₂-nu A mE₂.KUR—[za-kir]

(r 2) Tablet of Nidintu-Anu, son of Anu-Belšunu, descendant of Ekur-zakir, incantation priest of Anu and Antu, Urukean.

2 lines of 8 firing holes each
r 33

[lu₂]MAŠ.MAŠ d60 u an-tu₄ UNUGki u₂

2 signs erased
1 line of 6 firing holes
1 line with erased signs
r 44

ŠU mman-nu—i-qa-pu A ša₂ <<DIŠ>> DUMU-A.NI lu₂MAŠ.⸢MAŠ⸣

(r 4) Hand of Mannu-iqapu the son of his son, incantation priest of Anu and Antu. Month of Tašritu, the 4th day; year [...] .

1 line of 6 holes
r 55

d⸢60⸣ u an-tu₄ itiDU₆.[KU₃] ⸢U₄ 4?⸣.KAM MU x [...]

Traces of 2 vertical signs
